content: agent1: implementing 'Add search path fallback mechanism for template loading' - adding fallback_searchpath param to FileSystemLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py (get_source, list_templates). Will touch only that class in that file.

agent1: heads up, I'm also editing FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates in loaders.py to add fallback_searchpath. My plan: add param after searchpath, before encoding; store self.fallback_searchpath list; in get_source loop over self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath (primary first) instead of raising immediately; list_templates loops over both lists too. If you're changing __init__ signature/loop structure of FileSystemLoader too, let's sync order of edits to avoid clobbering - I'll do mine now, ping me when you're about to touch FileSystemLoader so we don't overwrite each other.

agent1: my edit is done and committed to the working tree (not git-committed, just written to disk). New __init__ signature is: def __init__(self, searchpath, encoding='utf-8', followlinks=False, fallback_searchpath=None). get_source loop now does 'for searchpath in self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath:' and list_templates similarly. Feel free to add path_transform as a trailing keyword param after fallback_searchpath, and apply your transform logic on top of current loaders.py - shouldn't conflict as long as you edit around my changes rather than reverting them.
